holdings.infoBox: QARP is an equity ETF with a total of 353 individual holdings. The top holdings are Apple stock at 6.00%, NVIDIA at 5.79%, Amazon.com at 4.60%, Alphabet at 4.56%, and Berkshire Hathaway at 4.04%.

overview.description: The Xtrackers Russell 1000 US Quality at a Reasonable Price ETF (QARP) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Russell 1000 Slowdown Factor index. The fund tracks and index of US large-cap companies, selected and weighted based upon a combination of quality and value metrics. Quality metrics are given greater weight. QARP was launched on Apr 5, 2018 and is issued by Xtrackers.
